title: Mystical Augments Everywhere
description: Mystical Agriculture Addon to allow augments on all tools and armor
body:
# **Mystical Agriculture Augment Expansion**  

An **addon** for the **Mystical Agriculture** mod that expands the functionality of **augments**, allowing them to be **attached to any armor and tools**—not just the **Essence tools**!

**Check out the gallery for a quick introduction for the default mod mechanics!**

## **✨ Features**  
- ![Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8f50f971086a4ca2e32d009ccf4e58a91b1b9bf.png) ![Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de387aa3f1ce14558b8f05ce037ad08400ea8e4d.png) ![Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/370ce9d80e756007ed964229539e3cde87807ad8.png) ![Shovel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a0b15c74bb0d7db3215cd07ef6877c877dfbd27.png) **Configurable Augment Compatibility** → Use datapacks to **customize which equipment** can have augments applied.
- ![Socket I](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1550ed34abe8f1ea755676c91c7fb7904fe2833a.png) ![Gem I](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02cbf7f7a38ae91a6cdab6d09a3c6fb2480bc2c8.png) ![Gem III](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b76372160d2a6249efa82d65c0e6c988469bf6e.png) ![Gem V](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ce1fe9601204822ced810c0b795007e480f6f34.png) **Socket System & Smithing Templates** → Engrave **one or two socket slots** onto gear using **smithing templates**, with different **essence tiers** determining the number and strength of augments. For example, **two socket slots** can be limited to **tier 1 augments**.

## **📦 Dependencies**  
- 🚨(Required) [**Mystical Agriculture**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mystical-agriculture)
- 💡(Compatible) [**Mystical Agradditions**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mystical-agradditions)

## **🛠️ Modpack Developers**
This mod was specifically designed to be used in modpacks. Its inspiration is ATM 10!

For more information, check out the following topics:

- **[Enabling Augments for Equipment with Datapacks](https://github.com/CebbysMods/mystical-auguments-everywhere/wiki/Datapack-Guide)** → A detailed guide on how to enable augments for different types of equipment using **datapacks**.  
- **[Compatibility API to Add Icons to Smithing Recipes](#)** → Learn how to integrate custom icons into the smithing recipes using the provided API.

## **💬 Support & Feedback**  
If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, feel free to **report them** on the [GitHub](https://github.com/CebbysMods/mystical-auguments-everywhere) or leave a comment!
